headline: BMO Raises Alliant Energy Corporation (LNT) Target to $78, Maintains Outperform
summary: Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:LNT) is one of the 10 best stocks to invest in during a recession. On February 23, 2026, BMO Capital raised its price target on Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:LNT) from $72 to $78 while maintaining an Outperform rating. The update comes after the company posted its Q4 results. The firm noted that […]
